subcodes.first_line: O true friend! Thy letter was received, and the utmost joy was obtained from the service thou didst render unto His Honour the Afnán [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوست حقیقی نامه رسید و از همتی که در حق حضرت افنان فرمودید نهایت سرور حاصل
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @education of children; moral education, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @need for an educator
